name: Avocado Toast
desc: Creamy avocado on perfectly toasted bread. A wholesome, flavourful bite to start your day right.

name: Banoffee Pie
desc: The dessert that started it all. Toffee, banana, and clouds of whipped cream in a buttery biscuit shell.

name: Black Forest Cake
desc: Layers of dark chocolate sponge, cherries, and whipped cream. A timeless classic done beautifully.

name: Jamun Tea Cake
desc: A delicate tea cake infused with the bold flavour of jamun. Light, fragrant, and beautifully unique.

name: Jowar Mawa Cake
desc: Wholesome jowar flour meets rich mawa in this rustic, indulgent cake. Tradition baked into every slice.

name: Korean Buns
desc: Pillowy soft milk buns with a generous filling. Inspired by Korean bakery tradition, made with love.

name: Lily Cake
desc: An elegant floral cake as beautiful as it is delicious. A showstopper for every celebration.

name: London Chocolate Caramel Cake
desc: A luxurious layered cake with deep chocolate sponge and silky caramel. London-inspired, Banoffee perfected.

name: Mango Coconut Cake
desc: The tropical combination you didn't know you needed. Fresh mango and coconut in every dreamy bite.

name: Mix Fruit Cake
desc: A celebration of seasonal fruits layered with light cream. Colourful, fresh, and utterly delightful.

name: Pinacolada Cake
desc: Pineapple, coconut, and cream layered into a cake that tastes like a beach holiday.

name: Ragi Chocolate Cake
desc: Rich chocolate cake made with ragi flour — indulgent taste with a wholesome twist.

name: Tiramisu
desc: Espresso-soaked ladyfingers layered with mascarpone cream and dusted with fine cocoa. Italian soul.

name: Chocolate Truffle 2.0
desc: Our upgraded truffle cake — deeper, richer, and more intense than ever. The ultimate chocolate experience.

name: Vanilla Caramel Cake
desc: Soft vanilla sponge drenched in buttery caramel. Simple, elegant, and impossible to resist.
